title: Ginza Line 1000 Series for MTR by Skywalker_6517
description: The Ginza Line 1000 Series for the MTR mod version 4. Built by Skywalker_6517
body:
The Tokyo Metro 1000 series (東京メトロ1000系, Tōkyō Metoro 1000-kei) is an electric multiple unit (EMU) train type operated by the Tokyo subway operator Tokyo Metro in Japan on the Tokyo Metro Ginza Line since April 2012.

The pack adds this train to Minecraft through the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod version 4 (MTR4). 
The length of each car is 17, and there are 4 types of cars (Forward, Trailer 1, Trailer 2 and Backward). The recommended unit is formed of 6 coaches.
